text:
The first image feels eerily quiet to me, almost as if I am in a liminal space between uses, waiting for purpose. The emptiness amplifies my own awareness and the passage of time.

The second image introduces me to a place of ideas and innovation—the "R+D" wall is vibrant and stimulating. Here, my mind is invited to wander freely among concepts, eager to investigate the interplay between humans and technology. I feel a rising curiosity, a sense of anticipation for discovery.
